CHAPTER VI
RECTIFICATION OF BIRTH TIME
1 shall now tell you some methods by which you can rectify
the noted time of birth. However, I have to warn you against
depending solely on them. One of the methods is the follow-
ing :—Convert the time of birth in Ghatis etc. after Sunrise into
Vighatis. Multiply this by 4 and divide the product by 9. The
remainder will indicate the number of the star of birth counted
from Asvini, Magha or Mula. If you apply this rule to our
example horoscope, you get 525 Vighatis. Then 525 x4/9=233
and a remainder of 3. But the 3rd star from Mula would be
Uttarasadha. This is not correct. We must get Satabhisak. If
you take 8g-30v as the time of birth in Ghatis, you get a balance
of 6 which gives us the star of birth exactly. So according to
